title: Lankasters Nether
description: Nether overhaul focused on adding biomes
body:
# This project has been archived, for continuation check out [Pyrellium](https://modrinth.com/mod/pyrellium) instead

# About
Lankasters Nether is a worldgen datapack, that focuses on adding new biomes to the nether. Each biome has something unique about them that should make it worth exploring.
This project was mostly born because other nether biome datapacks/mods did not fit my needs, so I decided to make one myself.

# Content
The pack adds 9 new biomes to the game, screenshots of them can be found in the gallery. Also increases the nether world height to 192.

Click the image below to be taken to [Bisect's website](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
[![Bisect hosting partner link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/fb7898b4-ee4f-42cd-9efa-976d75278335.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
